headline: Is Corning (GLW) Getting Ahead Of Itself After A 311% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Corning’s recent share price makes sense or feels stretched, this guide walks through what that current price could imply about the stock’s value. The stock last closed at US$182.40, with returns of 11.1% over 7 days, 22.8% over 30 days, 101.2% year to date and 311.0% over the past year, which naturally raises questions about how much optimism is already reflected in the price. Recent news coverage has focused on Corning’s role as a key technology supplier,...
